response.overview: The Brightest Sound is the third snowboard video release from Warior Films and 16-year-old filmmaker Cody Allen. This 16mm film gives you an entertaining look into the lives and riding of some of the biggest up-and-comers in snowboarding including, Mason Aguirre, Nik Batko, George Oakley, Drew Fuller, Ryan Lougee, Kelly Clark, and the Burton Girls. The Brightest Sound is packed with plent of good old snowboard action fun.
response.title: The Brightest Sound
